title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 16 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 16 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 16 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 16/04/2024
DCE iron ore futures fall today, The main contract I2409 closed at 826; an decrease of 1.49% throughout the day;Traders ship according to market condiƟons; Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchased on demand. PBF at Shandong port dealt 843-847 yuan/mt; decrease 10-15 yuan/mt over yesterday. PBF at Tangshan port dealt 865-875 yuan/mt; decreased 15 yuan/mt over yesterday.
